channel.title: Home on Hardware Hacking Laboratory
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Hardware Hacking Laboratory

item.title: About
item.description:
H2Lab is a nonprofit organization focused on open hardware, embedded systems, and practical security research.

We design and document tools, platforms, and methods that make experimentation more accessible for researchers, educators, students, and engineers.

What we work on

  • Open hardware platforms for analysis and experimentation
  • Tooling for embedded security research
  • Technical publications, guides, and recommendations
  • Training, workshops, and educational support
  • Collaborative projects with academic and technical partners

How we share our work

We publish reproducible material whenever possible: source code, hardware designs, implementation notes, and technical write-ups that can be reused by the wider community.

item.title: Contact
item.description:
H2Lab welcomes conversations about research, training, workshops, and open hardware collaborations.

Typical topics

  • Embedded systems and hardware security
  • Open hardware design and prototyping
  • Educational initiatives and technical mentoring
  • Community, association, and partnership requests

Contact page

Use this page to publish your preferred public contact channels, such as email, a contact form, or social links.

item.title: Nouveau guide technique : Protection mémoire physique pour systèmes embarqués
item.description: Publication d’un nouveau guide STIG sur la protection mémoire des microcontrôleurs et l’usage de la MPU comme contrôle de sécurité défendable.

item.title: H2Lab est sponsor officiel LeHack 2026
item.description: H2Lab sera présent à LeHack 2026 et animera, avec Twisted Wires, un workshop technique sur le contournement des protections JTAG.

item.title: Prose
item.description:
@tailwindcss/typography

View on GitHub!

Beautiful typographic defaults for HTML you don’t control.

The official Tailwind CSS Typography plugin provides a set of prose classes you can use to add beautiful typographic defaults to any vanilla HTML you don’t control, like HTML rendered from Markdown, or pulled from a CMS.

Tailwind CSS IntelliSense extension for Visual Studio Code

<article class="prose lg:prose-xl">
  {{ markdown }}
</article>

To see what it looks like in action, check out our live demo on Tailwind Play. ​

item.title: Welcome to the H2Lab blog
item.description: A starting point for H2Lab updates, technical notes, and open hardware publications.
